headings.usage: Use for all primary section headers, hero text, and major numbers. Apply tracking-tighter for a tight, premium look.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, form inputs, and data tables. This anchors the 'Bloomberg Terminal' aesthetic.

data_metrics.usage: Use for Vibe Scores, API endpoint names, and live statistics. Add tracking-widest for overlines.

visual_enhancers.surface_strategy: Glassmorphism mixed with Terminal Grid. Use bg-black/40 with backdrop-blur-xl and a delicate 1px border-white/10 for cards floating over images. For data panels, use stark, solid #0A0A0A backgrounds with border-white/10.
visual_enhancers.textures: Overlay a subtle film grain (SVG noise filter) across the entire page to give it a gritty, nightlife film feel.
visual_enhancers.lighting: Use glowing radial gradients placed behind major components to simulate neon club lighting bleeding into the terminal.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)] on key 'Vibe Score' metrics and active API endpoints.

grids_and_layouts.global: Use a generous spacing scale. p-8 to p-12 for standard sections, py-32 for main landing page sections.
grids_and_layouts.bento_grid: For the 'Product Showcase' (Scout Floor, Merchant Floor, Agent API), use the MODE A 'Tetris Grid'. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix tall, wide, and square cards to create visual tension.
grids_and_layouts.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all text and terminal-like data to reinforce the 'financial terminal' vibe. Do not center-align paragraphs.

motion.scroll: Implement 'lenis' for smooth scrolling to give the site a premium, weighty feel.
motion.micro_interactions: Terminal typing effects for headers. Hovering on a venue card should slightly translate-y and increase border opacity. Data numbers (Vibe Scores) should count up dynamically.
motion.marquee: Use a Kinetic Texture marquee in the background of the 'Waitlist' section. Large outline text of 'VIIBE LVE DATA' slowly scrolling.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all JetBrains Mono body text against #050505 meets 4.5:1 APCA contrast ratio. Avoid dark gray on black.
accessibility.focus_states: All form inputs and buttons MUST have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00F0FF] focus:outline-none.
accessibility.motion_preference: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all scroll and marquee animations.

components.name: HeroSection
components.instructions: Full height (min-h-screen). Background video/image of Lagos skyline/nightlife overlaid with terminal UI. Headline: 'Wherever people gather and feel something. VIIBE measures it. Live.' Unbounded font, massive size, tracking-tighter.

components.name: FeatureBento
components.instructions: Bento grid showcasing Scout Floor, Merchant Floor, and Agent API. Use sharp edges, terminal aesthetic, glassmorphism cards. Incorporate code snippets for the Agent API card.

components.name: LiveApiDocs
components.instructions: A section that looks like a live developer terminal. Left side: curl commands. Right side: dynamic JSON response showing fake live vibe scores from 'Lagos Victoria Island'. Use JetBrains Mono exclusively here.

components.name: WaitlistForm
components.instructions: Role-selector (Scout, Venue Owner, Developer). Custom Shadcn inputs with terminal styling (square edges, border-b only, or sharp 1px full border). Neon coral or cyan submit button.

media.icons: lucide-react. Use stroke-width 1.5. Colors should be white or neon accents.

3d_libraries.usage: Use tsparticles to create a subtle, floating 'data node' network in the background of the API section to represent scene intelligence and real-time crowd data. Keep the particle count low and colors restricted to Cyan/Coral to maintain performance and avoid overwhelming the terminal UI.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind configuration: add custom colors (base, surface, cyan, coral, gold) and fonts (Unbounded, JetBrains Mono).
2. Implement a global noise overlay using a fixed, pointer-events-none SVG filter.
3. Build the HeroSection with an immersive background image and overlaying terminal-like floating widgets showing 'Live Vibe Scores'.
4. Construct the Waitlist section using standard HTML elements styled aggressively with Tailwind (Shadcn components heavily modified for sharp edges and terminal aesthetics).
5. Use Lucide React for all iconography.
6. Do not use generic Shadcn rounded cards; override styles to be sharp or extremely subtle rounded-sm, with strict border-white/10.
7. Include a 'data-testid' on all buttons and form inputs.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic.
Do not use dark colors as gradients. Dark colors look best when solid or glassmorphic.
Never center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is strictly forbidden). Use strict left-alignment for data/terminal vibes.
Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical bento grids.
Create depth using layered z-index hierarchy and backdrop-blur-xl (12-24px blur).
Do not apply 'transition: all'. Use specific transitions (e.g., transition-transform, transition-colors).
Add micro-animations to all interactive elements (hover states, focus states).
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (p-8, p-12, py-24).
Never use emoji characters for icons or UI elements. Use lucide-react.
Always use named exports for components and default exports for pages.
Ensure the JSON file created serves as the single source of truth for the aesthetic.
